patch_description: Enhances expressivity by mixing hub entanglement gates (CRX and CRY) with per-edge, edge-specific parameters in the center-to-edge connections. This interleaves different rotation axes in the hub layer to capture richer correlations while preserving the data-reuploading (l=3), 2-repeat per upload structure. Parameter sharing remains at the group level for pre/post-RZ and RY layers, maintaining symmetry advantages and parameter efficiency. This is intended to improve validation accuracy and reduce train-test gaps without changing the fixed training loop or data or feature map.
